modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add Jaggaer Add-in to Word due to access error.

full_description_text: User is trying to add the Jaggaer Add-in to Word. They get an error saying Office store not available. It says their organization has disabled access to the Office Store. User needs help to fix this issue.
